title: Doctoral Program in Psychology Mission and Vision
content:
Doctoral Program in Psychology Mission and Vision

Mission

To provide both theoretical and practical knowledge from different subfields of psychology; to acquire the theoretical and practical knowledge of psychology in relation to theoretical and practical knowledge, and to educate professionals who will consider the implications of this in practice. The Ph.D. Program in Psychology has identified basic missions as an understanding of the interactions between psychology and disciplines that are known to be associated with such knowledge, as well as being able to assess the authenticity of scientific and current knowledge specific to the field of psychology. For this purpose, it helps individuals to acquire interdisciplinary and application-oriented information about the causes and outcomes of the transformations they live in.

Vision

International joint studies will be carried out to contribute to the scientific knowledge of the field of psychology; to educate professionals who will transform the knowledge and practices related to the field of psychology into projects within the framework of social responsibility approach.
